failure_modes.text: Base-rate neglect can let vivid case details overwhelm the statistical background information that should anchor the judgment.
failure_modes.mitigation: Anchor to base rates first: before processing vivid case details, look up the statistical background frequency and use it as the starting point for judgment.

failure_modes.text: Decorative statistical language can hide weak data quality, weak assumptions, or sampling problems.
failure_modes.mitigation: Audit data quality behind statistical claims: check sample size, sampling method, and measurement validity before trusting any reported statistic.

failure_modes.text: Overweighting the mean can hide extreme-outcome risk in distributions where tails matter more than the average case.
failure_modes.source_quote: placing too much emphasis on the mean outcome
failure_modes.mitigation: Report distributional shape, not just the mean: show the tails and spread of outcomes when the extremes carry more decision weight than the average.

premortem_questions.text: What would you have to believe?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What would you have to believe?

premortem_questions.text: Is the worst case bad enough?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Is the worst case bad enough?

premortem_questions.text: What assumption about the sample, baseline, or distribution would make this conclusion collapse first?

heuristics.text: Anchor to base rates and reference classes before adding the vivid details of the current case.
Use simulations or scenario analysis when the full outcome range matters more than one average estimate.
heuristics.source_quote: simulations are valuable tools for highlighting the range of possible outcomes

heuristics.text: Treat good statistical judgment as a process for making good decisions consistently, not as a guarantee of a good outcome every time.
heuristics.source_quote: good decisions ... the best way to achieve good outcomes in the long run

curation_notes.summary: Kept the intervention layer on base-rate anchoring, range-aware analysis, and process-quality judgment rather than generic quantitative language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve advanced-method sprawl because the raw source is strongest on signal detection, distributions, and inferential humility.
open_questions: The third premortem question is reviewed compression over the source's broader assumption-checking surface.

allies: The source is rich on scientific-method thinking, game theory, and systems causality.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section explicitly names intuitive System 1 shortcuts, narrative drift, and confirmation-bias pressure.
structured_tensions: No explicit structured tension block was preserved from the raw file.
